read_about: You can read all about here!
match_description: Based on your personal Holland Code, the following professions could be a good match for you:
realistic_02: Are you straightforward/frank? (frank: honest and direct in what you say)
realistic_03: Are you mechanically inclined? (mechanically inclined: naturally good at working with machines and tools)
realistic_05: Are you concrete? (concrete: focused on practical, real-world things rather than theories)
realistic_06: Are you reserved? (reserved: quiet and not very open or talkative)
realistic_15: Can you read a blueprint? (blueprint: a detailed technical drawing or plan)
realistic_17: Can you operate tools and machine?
realistic_18: Do you like to tinker with machines/vehicles? (tinker: experiment hands-on to fix or improve things)
realistic_19: Do you like to work outdoors?
realistic_20: Do you like to be physically active?
realistic_21: Do you like to use your hands?
realistic_22: Do you like to build things?
realistic_23: Do you like to tend/train animals?
realistic_24: Do you like to work on electronic equipment?
investigative_01: Are you inquisitive? (inquisitive: always curious and eager to ask questions and find answers)
investigative_05: Are you scholarly? (scholarly: dedicated to studying and gaining deep academic knowledge)
investigative_07: Are you intellectually self-confident? (intellectually self-confident: trusting your own thinking and knowledge)
investigative_12: Can you think abstractly? (abstractly: thinking about concepts and ideas rather than just concrete things)
investigative_16: Can you use a microscope or computer?
investigative_18: Do you like to explore a variety of ideas?
investigative_19: Do you like to work independently?
investigative_20: Do you like to perform lab experiments?
investigative_21: Do you like to deal with abstractions? (abstractions: general concepts or ideas not tied to specific real-world examples)
investigative_22: Do you like to do research?
investigative_23: Do you like to be challenged?
artistic_04: Are you unconventional? (unconventional: not following usual norms or typical expectations)
artistic_09: Are you introspective? (introspective: reflective about your own thoughts, feelings, and inner life)
artistic_10: Are you impulsive? (impulsive: acting on feelings without thinking things through first)
artistic_14: Are you idealistic? (idealistic: believing strongly in high ideals, even if they are hard to achieve)
artistic_15: Are you nonconforming? (nonconforming: not following what society typically expects)
artistic_17: Can you play a musical instrument?
artistic_18: Can you write stories, poetry, music?
artistic_20: Can you design fashions or interiors?
artistic_21: Do you like to attend concerts, theatre, art exhibits?
artistic_22: Do you like to attend concerts, theatre, art exhibits?
artistic_23: Do you like to read fiction, plays, and poetry?
artistic_24: Do you like to work on crafts?
artistic_25: Do you like to take photography?
artistic_26: Do you like to express yourself creatively?
artistic_27: Do you like to deal with ambiguous ideas? (ambiguous: unclear or open to more than one interpretation)
social_03: Are you idealistic? (idealistic: believing strongly in high ideals, even if they are hard to achieve)
social_04: Are you insightful? (insightful: able to understand people or situations in a deep, meaningful way)
social_16: Can you lead a group discussion?
social_17: Can you mediate disputes? (mediate: help two sides reach an agreement; disputes: disagreements or conflicts)
social_18: Can you plan and supervise an activity?
social_19: Can you cooperate well with others?
social_20: Do you like to work in groups?
social_21: Do you like to help people with problems?
social_22: Do you like to do volunteer work?
social_23: Do you like to work with young people?
social_24: Do you like to serve others?
enterprising_02: Are you assertive? (assertive: confident in expressing your opinions and standing up for yourself)
enterprising_03: Are you persuasive? (persuasive: able to convince others to agree with you or do something)
enterprising_09: Are you extroverted? (extroverted: outgoing and energized by being around and interacting with others)
enterprising_10: Are you spontaneous? (spontaneous: acting on impulse, without prior planning)
enterprising_12: Can you initiate projects? (initiate: start or begin something new)
enterprising_13: Can you convince people to do things your way?
enterprising_15: Can you give talks or speeches?
enterprising_19: Do you like to make decisions?
enterprising_20: Do you like to be elected to office? (elected to office: chosen by vote for a leadership or official position)
enterprising_21: Do you like to start your own business?
enterprising_22: Do you like to campaign politically? (campaign politically: actively work to get yourself or a candidate elected)
enterprising_23: Do you like to meet important people?
enterprising_24: Do you like to have power or status?
conventional_03: Are you numerically inclined? (numerically inclined: naturally comfortable and good at working with numbers)
conventional_04: Are you methodical? (methodical: following a careful, step-by-step plan to do things)
conventional_05: Are you conscientious? (conscientious: careful, thorough, and always trying to do the right thing)
conventional_07: Are you conforming? (conforming: following rules and meeting the expectations of others)
conventional_09: Are you thrifty? (thrifty: careful with money and not wasteful)
conventional_16: Can you work well within a system?
conventional_17: Can you do a lot of paper work in a short time?
conventional_19: Can you use a computer terminal?
conventional_20: Can you write effective business letters?
conventional_21: Do you like to follow clearly defined procedures?
conventional_22: Do you like to use data processing equipment?
conventional_23: Do you like to work with numbers?
conventional_24: Do you like to type or take shorthand? (shorthand: a fast writing method using abbreviations and symbols)
conventional_25: Do you like to be responsible for details?
conventional_26: Do you like to collect or organize things?
